comments.text: 🇺🇸👀 The US Air Force shot down a Boy Scout balloon with a $500,000 missile, mistaking it for a UFO. According to Pentagon documents, the incident occurred in February 2023 over Lake Huron in Michigan. F-16 fighter jet was scrambled to intercept the object and fired an AIM-9 Sidewinder missile.
